item.title: Behavior Change
item.description: Behavior change refers to efforts put in place to change people’s personal habits and attitudes, to prevent disease [1]. As a part of I507, I was tasked to use a health monitoring application and change a behavior. The idea was to understand what it takes to change a behavior so that we can design better applications for other people. In the context of Health (the topic of our class), behavior refers to a person’s beliefs and actions regarding their health and well-being.
